Package model

Class Card

java.lang.Object
model.Card
public class Card extends Object
Card class represent the card objects used in game, have attributes such as: images for front and back, name, type, flipped status, and board position

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Card(javafx.scene.image.Image img, String name, String type, int scale, String backCard)
    Card constructor uses an image, name and type to create a card object

  • Constructor Details

    • Card

      public Card(javafx.scene.image.Image img, String name, String type, int scale, String backCard)
      Card constructor uses an image, name and type to create a card object
      Parameters:
      img - Image to be used by card
      name - String represents the card name
      type - String represents the card type
      int - Integer represents the size of the image

  • Method Details

    • getNameOfBackOfCard

      public String getNameOfBackOfCard()

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      setId assigns id to boardPos
      Parameters:
      id - String represents the unique id of the card object

    • setPath

      public void setPath(String path)

    • setScale

      public void setScale(int scale)

    • getPath

      public String getPath()

    • getPair

      public Card getPair()
      getPair returns the pair of a given card
      Returns:
      pair Card represents the pair of a given card

    • getBackOfCard

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getBackOfCard()
      getBackOfCard returns the image used for the back of a card object
      Returns:
      backOfCard Image the image on the back of cards

    • getImage

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getImage()
      getImage returns the front image of a card object
      Returns:
      picture Image the image on the front of the card

    • rescale

      public void rescale(int scale)
      rescale rescales the given card's picture
      Parameters:
      scale - int the scale that the card will be sized at

    • rescale

      public void rescale(String fileName)

    • setImage

      public void setImage(javafx.scene.image.Image image, javafx.scene.image.Image back)
      setImage sets the card's picture
      Parameters:
      image - Image the picture that represents the subject

    • getName

      public String getName()
      getName returns the name of the card object
      Returns:
      Name String represents the name of the card

    • getType

      public String getType()

    • flip

      public void flip()
      flip inverts the flipped boolean status

    • isItFlipped

      public boolean isItFlipped()
      isItFlipped returns whether a card is flipped or not
      Returns:
      flipped Boolean represents if a card is flipped

    • sameComparison

      public boolean sameComparison(Card card1)
      sameComparison checks if the name of one card == the name of other
      Parameters:
      card1 - Card card object to compare current (this) card against
      Returns:
      Boolean true if equals else return false

    • typeComparsion

      public boolean typeComparsion(Card card1)
      typeComparsion checks if the type of one card == the type of other
      Parameters:
      card1 - Card card object to compare current (this) card against
      Returns:
      Boolean true if types are same else return false

    • getFileName

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getFileName(String str, int scale)
      getFileName takes a str that represent the specifics of the card file name and adds system specific file path elements to get correct card image
      Parameters:
      str - String represents the elements of the file path unique to the specific card
      Returns:
      image1 Image returns an image specific to the card file path generated by getFileName
